name: attach_bat
description: Attaches a cylindrical bat to the robot's hand for striking objects.
source_code:
async def attach_bat():
    return await attach_gripper(
        gripper_xml='<body name="bat" pos="0 0 0.11">' 
                    '<geom type="cylinder" size="0.02 0.2" rgba="0.6 0.4 0.2 1" mass="0.1"/>' 
                    '</body>',
        tcp_offset="0 0 0.31")
